text:
South Korean Olympic silver medallist shooter Kim Ye-ji has dramatically collapsed at a press conference atParis2024 due to stress and exhaustion.

The incident, which you can watch with our video, occurred on Friday and Kim has since regained consciousness, with theOlympicsstar taken to hospital for checks.

Kim clinched silver in the 10-metre air pistol event and has attracted headlines for her ultra-calm demeanour, drawing online praise from the likes ofElon Musk.

It is thought that Kim, 31, did not receive CPR after she collapsed, despite that being reported by some media outlets.

To view this video please enable JavaScript, and consider upgrading to a web
							browser thatsupports HTML5
								video

Up Next

Musk, the Tesla chief and owner of X, formerly known as Twitter, told Kim that she should star in an action movie after she went viral on his social media platform.

Kim sent social media into a frenzy when footage re-emerged of her setting a world record in May.

In the clip, Kim is wearing a black cap turned backwards, sci-fi-esque shooting glasses and a pink elephant doll tied at her hip.

It inspired lots of memes, fan art and various video montages with Kim very much becoming an online sensation.

‘This Olympics feels like a turning point in my life,’ the South Korean star told theLos Angeles Times.

‘I realised that I still have so much I can improve. That is the single most meaningful takeaway for me this time.

‘Until now, I thought that I was a perfect shooter with absolutely no weaknesses to work on.

‘I’m not sure where the media heard that the elephant doll was a gift from my daughter, but that part isn’t true… It was actually a hand towel my coach gave me because our hands get greasy from loading cartridges into our pistols!’

title: Paris Olympics shooter dramatically collapses during press conference | Metro News
description: Watch the video as South Korean Olympic silver medallist shooter Kim Ye-ji collapses at a Paris press conference over stress and exhaustion.
